summary: The diff shows modifications to App.tsx, index.css, and BottomNavigationIcon.tsx, but critically, the actual content of BottomNavigationIcon.tsx is not included in the diff summary. Without seeing the changes to this component (which is the primary target of REQ-1), I cannot definitively verify if the bottom navigation icon was properly removed or disabled. The modifications to App.tsx and index.css appear unrelated to removing the bottom navigation icon.

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove the bottom navigation icon that appears in the bottom-right corner of the screen
missing_requirements.reason: The BottomNavigationIcon.tsx file is listed as modified but its content is not shown in the diff. Without seeing these changes, I cannot verify if the component was removed, disabled, or if the circular navigation button with maximum z-index is no longer rendered. The modifications to App.tsx do not show any changes related to removing or disabling the BottomNavigationIcon component.
